model: Lancer Evolution VI Ralliart eXtreme RS450
description: One of the rarest Lancer Evolutions ever built, understood to be one of only four produced, of which three now remain. Celebrating the Evo’s last true success in motorsport, the RS450 boasts a Ralliart-blueprinted engine with competition-spec rally parts producing around 440bhp and 412lb-ft of torque
creator: Bnuuy
